message:
fix(review-r2): clock skew + poison recovery in ATC event log

reservation_outcome_for_agent() used `break` on out-of-order timestamps,
missing valid events behind clock-skewed entries. Changed to `continue`
so the full ring buffer window is scanned.

Read-only ATC queries (reservation_outcome, decision_record,
agent_last_activity) recovered from poisoned mutex by reading
potentially-corrupted state. Changed to `.lock().ok()?` to return None
instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
